mrmagpie 1.65.0
  • Reference

mrmagpie: madrat based MAgPIE Input Data Library

Source: R/mrmagpie-package.R
mrmagpie-package.Rd

Provides functions for MAgPIE country and cellular input data generation.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/pik-piam/mrmagpie

  • doi:10.5281/zenodo.4319612

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/pik-piam/mrmagpie/issues

On this page
